calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial.
Dept. 514; Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Liana Ayrapetyan, Esq., appearing on behalf of Plaintiff Mercy Housing California.
Witness Aisha Forks sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Sade Nalls.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1100 Ocean Ave., #413, San Francisco, California 94112, County of San Francisco.
Damages $128.00
Holdover damages $0
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $0
For a Total Judgment of $128.00
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 12
Judge: Leslie Nichols, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Mercy Housing California is present. Represented by Jimmy Newell.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for plaintiff.
Defendant Sade Nalls is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of June 5, 2017 remains on calendar. (501)
